meta.description:
Welcome to Maum, the friendly voice chat app for building meaningful global connections. Whether you’re seeking new friends, practicing languages, or simply enjoying authentic conversations, Maum has everything you need!

🤝 Make Friends Safely and Instantly
• Connect with like-minded individuals from around the world in just seconds.
• Teenagers are matched with teenagers only, ensuring age-appropriate and safe conversations.
• Tired of endlessly swiping through profiles on other apps to make f

I've been unfairly blocked from this app without getting the chance to use it. I have contacted tech support and left my email. I hope this can be sorted out so I can improve my language learning. Thank you!
I was so happy when I spoke to a very cute and nice lady 🥹 this app is amazingly cool 🤭

I was very active there and I also made a lot of good friends.. one of my friend got jealous of me and broke the rules by using my phone.. now maum banned me for lifetime.. I wanted a second chance but they are very strict.. although I think it's very good app.. I wish I could join maum again..
i love it here

I'm soo very much in love with this app, it connects me with people from all around the world, and the best part is there's no limitations at all, like you can call people from anywhere without getting a limit exceeded notification....you can even pay for stuffs like unlimited chat with ballons, no cash spent. easy peasy. maum is literally the nest stress-free app I've used so far.
i really like this app, been playing it for years now and met lots of new friends!
good for usual practice in the target language
the apps isn't always good, but somehow when it works , the conversations are enjoyable.

This app makes learning languages feel really natural. You’re not just studying, you’re actually talking to real people and learning how they really speak. I’ve met some kind and interesting people here, which makes the experience even better. It’s simple, fun, and way more enjoyable than learning alone. Definitely worth trying if you want to improve your language skills in a more real way.
great

helpful_positive.text: I hate that I cannot delete stuff in the chat. It takes about 10 minutes for me to connect with someone and were only given a short amount of time to talk and not enough to see if we wanna continue talking to one another. The people are friendly. The balloon 🎈 idea is weird 🤔. It takes at least 4-5 ads to get one ticket 🎟 which Is crazy. The app does have room for improvement.

Honestly I like the app itself, it is quite free spirited and makes me quite comfy, tho since I just started using the app things are still confusing to me. For instance how do I talk to someone, I was on a call with someone but that person ended up leaving because they couldn't hear me, I wasn't trying to be rude but I was confused on how to talk on there, I joined a call so abruptly that I panicked. Apart from that the fact that we gotta pay with bubble in order to start a chat is too much

the app is dope, there are nice people there. just so U know the Korea people in this app are legit some are really nice and friendly, U just need to be patient too if U not so good at Korean cuz some of them are not so good at English too. The only problem I have is the balloon, yes there are free daily balloons, buh it's not really enough, so d amount to purchase balloons is really expensive, not everybody can afford that, you guys need to reduce the amount a bit. that's why I gave it 4stars.

this app is great and you will really meet friends here, though they should increase the time since it's only seven minutes. and about the balloons, if they can't increase what they give daily, they should just add more tasks because the payment for the balloon is too high. though, overall, it's great and recommended.

I enjoy using Maum because the random call feature makes it easy and exciting to meet people from different countries. I have made some great international friends through this app, and the connections feel natural and genuine. However, I don’t like the balloon system. Almost every action, like chatting or viewing a profile, costs balloons, and they run out very quickly. It would be better if basic interactions required fewer balloons. Overall, it’s a great app for meeting new people globally .

it is such a great app and safety is superb I love it. I will try as much as possible to invite friends because the app is amazing but rather strict with their balloons hope you could do something about that for those of us not able to buy them .

My experience on this app so far has been nice...have been able to speak to people from other countries but I lost contact with them after the free 7seconds call...I really wish something can be done to allow us to be able to share handles apart from having to subscribe .and the subscription rate is also too high...not everyone can afford it please And up till now I'm yet to receive the bonus I'm supposed to get for dropping a review

Maum is a refreshing app for anyone seeking emotional support and meaningful conversations. The interface is simple and calming, making it easy to connect with listeners from around the world. I appreciate the focus on empathy and privacy. While response times can vary, the overall experience feels genuine and comforting—great for moments when you just need someone to listen.

The app is very nice it connects you to foreigners but it's just like a short time calling you don't get to talk to the person any longer but it's nice especially for speaking with locals if you're learning a new language it makes learning a new language fun

helpful_negative.text: Skip skip skip skip Skip skip skip skip Skip skip skip skip .... I mean what the hell is going on ... There should be some short of levels before making new call ... It's annoying ... It happens so many times ... tbh, it's a useless app. Edit: You got me wrong. I'm not skipping. Others are skipping ME. And it happens very fast. Very frequently. Please, slow this process.

The app is has good potential. However, there are few users and the monetizing strategy isn't attractive. They just give 7min to chat with a matched person, then you have to pay to talk more. You cannot start a conversation with anyone unless you pay. You could've kept the chatting feature for free, people who want more like calls or to be more flexible in the choice of their match can pay the premium fee. It would allow you to attract more users and more profit.

I was a new user and you blocked my account without a valid reason, didn't even give me a chance to say anything. And now when I'm trying to join with other mail, you are saying my account is permanently banned. what's wrong with you guys ? you don't even optimise the app better, I always faced those network issues. And Now I can't even contact you people. there is no option for anything to do. I don't think that you guys will even respond here, because you guys don't even care.

It's a great concept however the balloons are expensive and I think you shouldn't have to pay to make new friends. Another thing is that it keeps say "something wrong, try again later" when I wait for ads to appear so I can collect tickets. I don't know if its just me, but every time I access the app it keeps sending a specific person (just one) waves (the waving hand thing) and I didn't even click on the person or the hand, which is making me seem like a stalker or something, please help.

I'm giving this app 2 stars today so that, the problem I'm currently facing will get noticed quickly. I don't know if the feature has been removed but, during the voice calls, I can't send messages again. After typing in what I want to send, the send button isn't visible anymore,bfor me to send the message. At first, I thought it was just a glitch and tried to update. But, the issue still remained. Like I've always said, I really like this app and hope that this gets fix quickly. ☺️

This app is very bad; I don't recommend it. It has many annoying ads and frequently drops calls due to ads. This app is more focused on profit than user comfort.These ads also contain many viruses that can infiltrate your device and steal your data Beware of this nonsense

no matter how much i love this app, it keeps cancelling calls, the app keeps turning off completely, making having a conversation very complicated and almost impossible at times. it lags so much, every call cuts off for no reason almost. the app cannot be used.

For some reason I am logged out from the app when I didn't press anything, I only used the app 4 times a week before and this doesn't happened to me. So i was wondering if I did not follow the terms and conditions or the policy, but after I tried to log in, it kept asking me to re-login because it says "something went wrong". I'm not sure if others experience the same thing but I hope this issue will be solved or at least, let me know about what's the reason I'm logged out for no reason. Thanks
Very useful to use,I can make many friends and have fun with everyone but my problem is that we always have limited tym for chatting But I will recommend it for everyone to use so nice
I have been using this application for a long time but nowadays there are too many ads furthermore the call ending byself.
